description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular, flat-panel design with a wide display area on the front, divided into two vertical sections that appear to show printed or digital information, possibly schedules or advertisements. The structure is supported by a sturdy, geometric pedestal base that provides stability. The kiosk is constructed from a dark, metallic or composite material, giving it a modern and robust appearance. The front display is bordered by a thick frame, and the rear is solid and unadorned, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The sides are extremely thin, highlighting the slim profile of the display unit. There are no visible windows, doors, or interactive hardware such as buttons or touchscreens, suggesting a primarily informational or advertising function.
description: A modern, dark-colored kiosk with a wide, dual-panel display and a sturdy pedestal base, designed for informational or advertising use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual-panel display with decorative elements and calendar-like text, framed by a thick border and supported by a central pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the kiosk's extremely slim profile and the depth of the pedestal base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, unadorned back panel and the geometric pedestal structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness of the display and the supporting base.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated into the front display panels, featuring decorative borders and calendar-like text
attribute_roof_design: flat, rectangular top with no overhangs or decorative features, matching the kiosk's modern style
